props.title: Our Premium Services
props.description: Tailored grooming solutions for every dog, every need.

items.title: Luxury Bath
items.description: A thorough, spa-like bath using premium, pet-safe products. Ideal for removing dirt, allergens, and odors while leaving your dog’s coat silky and shiny.

items.title: Stylish Trimming
items.description: Precise grooming for a polished look. From breed-specific cuts to creative styles, our team ensures your dog’s fur is trimmed to perfection.

items.title: Wellness Check
items.description: Combined with grooming, our technicians perform a quick health check to spot any issues early. A proactive approach to your pet’s well-being.
